#--- transceiver-demo-01 show running-config Execute at 2026-04-22 18:00:00
transceiver-demo-01#show running-config
Building configuration...

Current configuration : 612 bytes
!
version 16.12
service timestamps debug datetime msec
service timestamps log datetime msec
!
hostname transceiver-demo-01
!
ip domain name corp.example.com
!
! Two physical 10G slots: one carries a 1G optic (should be reclassified
! to 1G demand by the refiner), one carries a real 10G optic.
interface TenGigabitEthernet0/0/1
 description WAN uplink — 1G optic in 10G slot
 ip address 203.0.113.10 255.255.255.252
 no shutdown
!
interface TenGigabitEthernet0/0/2
 description WAN backup — true 10G optic
 ip address 203.0.113.14 255.255.255.252
 no shutdown
!
ip route 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 203.0.113.9
!
end

#--- transceiver-demo-01 show inventory Execute at 2026-04-22 18:00:05
transceiver-demo-01#show inventory
NAME: "Chassis", DESCR: "Cisco ASR1001-X Chassis"
PID: ASR1001-X         , VID: V07 , SN: FOX2222DEMO

#--- transceiver-demo-01 show interfaces transceiver detail Execute at 2026-04-22 18:00:10
transceiver-demo-01#show interfaces transceiver detail
                            Optical   Optical
            Temperature  Voltage  Current   Tx Power  Rx Power
Port           (Celsius)    (Volts)  (mA)      (dBm)     (dBm)
---------    -----------  -------  --------  --------  --------
Te0/0/1            34.2     3.31     8.5      -2.0      -3.4
Te0/0/2            33.0     3.30    10.1       0.5       0.0

TenGigabitEthernet0/0/1
  Transceiver Type      : SFP+
  Media Type            : 1000BASE-T
  Connector Type        : RJ45
TenGigabitEthernet0/0/2
  Transceiver Type      : SFP+
  Media Type            : 10GBASE-LR
  Connector Type        : LC
